This is a testharness.js-based test.

[FAIL] elu float32 4D tensor negative options.alpha

[FAIL] elu float16 negative 0D scalar default options
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test elu float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected -0.97900390625 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 18 but got 48085
